ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_WEIRD_EGG.title: [Persona: Steamed Egg]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_WEIRD_EGG.descript: At the start of every 3rd turn, add 1 [card]Trouble Maker[/card] to your hand.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_WEIRD_EGG.flavor: It always finds the perfect beat for the worst possible idea.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SAMURAI_PRAWN.desc: At the start of every 3rd turn, add 1 [card]Famous Blade[/card] to your hand. The first time each turn you attack an enemy, gain 1 stack of [power]Sword Aura[/power]. The first 2 stacks each make your attacks deal 1 extra damage. The 3rd stack makes your attacks deal 2 extra damage. Maximum 3 stacks.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SAMURAI_PRAWN.flav: A single slash settles the stance. The third slash settles the battle.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SLIME_LULU.title: [Persona: Slime Lulu]
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_SLIME_LULU.descrip: Lose 10 Max HP. When taking damage, gain 1 stack of [power]Half Life Heal[/power] and reduce this effect's cooldown by 1 turn. At the start of every 3rd turn, add 1 [card]Healing Slime[/card] to your hand.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_BIONIC_JASMINE.des: Gain steps when entering rooms (varies by room type). At combat start, lose 1 Strength and 1 Dexterity. Every 13 steps gained grants 1 Strength/Dexterity (alternating). Lose combat-gained Strength/Dexterity after combat ends.
